items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 正式声明：美国政府已下达出口管制指令，要求暂停对 Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的全部访问。这是硬性合规事件，相对此前的 Fable 5 发布（6 月 9 日上线，6 月 12 日被临时下线）进一步明确暂停范围扩至两个模型，开发者无法再通过任何渠道调用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：将所有调用 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 的代码切回 Claude Opus 4.8 或 Claude Sonnet 系列；移除相关环境变量、prompt 模板中的硬编码 model 名；关注 Anthropic 后续是否给出 deprecation 终态时间表与数据留存强制要求。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布"Claude Tag"，称其为团队与 Claude 协作的新方式。原文摘要被多条其他公告噪音污染，缺乏接口层面细节；从标题与"Product"分类看属于产品功能更新，可能涉及新的协作 / 标签机制。需访问原链接确认是否引入新的 API 字段或 SDK 方法。
items.backend_focus: 关注点：访问原链接获取 Claude Tag 的具体接口与 SDK 变更；若涉及 messages API 新参数（如 metadata / tag 字段），需评估现有日志与计费埋点是否要扩展；目前信息不足，建议先 hold on 集成。

Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Produ...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动"Claude Corps"国家级青年 fellowship 项目，面向早期职业人员推广 AI 社区服务。属人才 / 公益类项目公告，无 API、SDK、模型或定价变化。相对历史已有"跟进报道"记录，本次仅是同一公告的重复分发，无新增工程信息。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是公益/人才项目，与 AI 基础设施、API、SDK 无关，后端团队无需任何行动。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家。属企业 AI 安全 / 部署研究项目的扩容公告，没有发布新的 model id、API 端点、参数或定价变化。相对历史"跟进报道"已记录同一事实，本次无新增工程层面进展。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是研究项目扩容公告，不涉及 API/SDK/模型/定价变化，后端团队无需任何调整。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级，编码、agentic 任务与专业工作场景表现更强。属新模型上线，相对此前 Opus 4.5 在 SWE-bench / agentic 评测上有提升；旧 Opus 4.5 暂未宣布 deprecate，但需关注 messages API 中 model 字段新值 claude-opus-4-8 的可用区域与 max_tokens / context window。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：在非生产环境将 model 字段切换为 claude-opus-4-8 跑回归，重点验证长上下文（context window）与 tool use 行为；关注 Anthropic 控制台中 Opus 4.8 的区域可用性与 rate limit，准备 fallback 到 claude-opus-4-5 的开关。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期 "Anthropic Public Record" 的结果摘要，分类为 Announcements，但原文摘要缺失。属透明度 / 政策类公告，预期涵盖使用模式、安全事件或政策更新；未提及具体 API、SDK、模型或定价变化。
items.backend_focus: 信息不足，建议暂不行动。若后续发布涉及数据留存、prompt logging 开关或 abuse policy 变化，再评估是否需要修改 client 端合规配置；目前无明确工程动作。
